section.title: Add APT sources repositories
section.para: Open /etc/apt/sources.list. For each deb line, add the same line with deb replaced with deb-src. For instance, here's how it should look like in Linux Mint 13:
section.screen:
deb http://packages.linuxmint.com maya main upstream import deb-src http://packages.linuxmint.com maya main upstream import
deb http://archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu/ precise main restricted universe multiverse deb-src http://archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu/ precise main restricted universe multiverse
deb http://archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu/ precise-updates main restricted universe multiverse deb-src http://archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu/ precise-updates main restricted universe multiverse
deb http://extras.ubuntu.com/ubuntu precise main deb-src http://extras.ubuntu.com/ubuntu precise main

section.title: Get build dependencies
section.para: Then we install the packages needed to compile the lemon stack. Run the following in a terminal (as root):
section.screen: apt-get update apt-get install dpkg-dev sudo apt-get build-dep lemon lemon-control-center lemon-desktop lemon-menus lemon-screensaver lemon-session lemon-settings-daemon lemon-translations cjs muffin nemo
section.para: Now get the latest git code for everything. Run (not as root):
section.screen: git clone git://github.com/SLSTunnel/lemon.git git clone git://github.com/SLSTunnel/lemon-control-center.git git clone git://github.com/SLSTunnel/lemon-desktop.git git clone git://github.com/SLSTunnel/lemon-menus.git git clone git://github.com/SLSTunnel/lemon-screensaver.git git clone git://github.com/SLSTunnel/lemon-session.git git clone git://github.com/SLSTunnel/lemon-settings-daemon.git git clone git://github.com/SLSTunnel/lemon-translations.git git clone git://github.com/linuxmint/cjs.git git clone git://github.com/linuxmint/muffin.git git clone git://github.com/linuxmint/nemo.git

section.title: Compile and install the stack
section.para: Build and install in the following order. Some packages are required to be installed prior to building later packages. See below for how to build and install.
section.screen: lemon-translations lemon-desktop lemon-menus **INSTALL PRECEDING PACKAGES** lemon-session lemon-settings-daemon lemon-screensaver cjs **INSTALL PRECEDING PACKAGES** lemon-control-center muffin **INSTALL PRECEDING PACKAGES** lemon nemo **INSTALL PRECEDING PACKAGES**

section.title: Optional: Compiling from stable branch
section.para: The instructions above compile the Lemon stack from their "master" branch, which isn't always stable. To compile from the stable branch, instead of the usual building procedure, you need to to the following (for all packages):
section.screen: cd *package-name* git checkout stable dpkg-buildpackage cd ..
